item.description:
Pls follow @Global Sumud Flotilla for more updates, and share all news you see on , they think if they do it early enough they can shut down attention

item.title: Do not allow this to be normalised and the only way we do not allow that to be so is by showing the power we have control over w...
item.description:
Do not allow this to be normalised and the only way we do not allow that to be so is by showing the power we have control over what is normal.

item.title: April 29, 7 EST, the Orrs of the Flotilla are reporting that the IDF is approaching and intercepting it ships attempting to brin...
item.description:
April 29, 7 EST, the Orrs of the Flotilla are reporting that the IDF is approaching and intercepting it ships attempting to bring life-saving aid to Gaza and are jamming their communications and sending threatening radio messages



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Pretty easy to succeed when you get $1 billion cash infusion in terms of power when your founder is given control of one of the ...
item.description:
Pretty easy to succeed when you get $1 billion cash infusion in terms of power when your founder is given control of one of the largest media organisations in the world#greenscreenvideo

item.title: the truth is many times these things do roll over many times he can avoid it
item.description:
the truth is many times these things do roll over many times he can avoid it. It is our responsibility to make sure that doesn’t happen.#greenscreenvideo
